LanguageData.FCP_Item_USA_MRE.label: US MRE
LanguageData.FCP_Item_USA_MRE.description: A military Meal Ready to Eat from the United States Armed Forces. Individually packaged and designed for field use, it contains a complete meal with multiple components including an entree, sides, dessert, and accessories. More filling and palatable than standard survival packs, though it will never win any culinary awards. Never rots but can deteriorate if left outside.
